response.justification: Despite extensive experience as a senior software developer, the candidate lacks demonstrated Java proficiency in recent roles, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and holds a senior-level profile incompatible with an entry-level role, raising concerns about overqualification, cultural fit, and salary expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong contributions to open-source and community education (workshops, talks)
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing to meet required fluency
Overqualified with 10+ years of senior experience, not entry-level
Recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with minimal recent Java exposure
